ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, premium, free) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Current subscription status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist performing the song */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "composer" TEXT /* Composer of the song */,
  "lyricist" TEXT /* Lyricist of the song */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the song */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the song in seconds */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album this song belongs to */,
  "released_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the playlist (public/private) */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is collaborative or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the song to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, pause, skip) */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song played */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "activity_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_info" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist performs */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_info" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_info_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artist_info ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_info" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_info" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "bd" INTEGER /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "registered_via" INTEGER /* Method used to register for the service */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registration_info" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "registration_init_time" TEXT /* Time the user registered for the service */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the user's subscription expires */,
  "plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Role of the user (e.g., admin, premium, free)
Date the user account was created
Last time the user logged in
Current subscription status of the user

ID of the album this song belongs to

ID of the user who added the song to the playlist
